with_skill.notes: Comprehensive design with detailed ADRs, extensive Terraform code, specific cost projections, clear auto-scaling metrics, and well-defined scale triggers with traffic thresholds.

without_skill.notes: Good cost breakdown and services but lacks formal ADRs, auto-scaling lacks specific metrics/thresholds, and scale triggers are timeline-based rather than traffic/metric-driven.

evals.prompt: AWS bill review - $800 to $2400 cost spike analysis

with_skill.notes: Comprehensive AWS cost analysis with structured breakdown, specific recommendations with ROI, before/after projections, severity-prioritized findings, monitoring strategy, and dependency mapping.

without_skill.notes: Baseline FAILED - agent asked for AWS account access instead of providing analysis based on information given.
